title: Email Template Layout

statement.markdown:
Create a responsive email template layout using HTML and CSS. The template should have a hero section, a feature section, and a call-to-action section.
requirements
1. Use Tailwind CSS for styling.
2. The hero section should have a background image and a heading.
3. The feature section should have three features displayed horizontally.
4. The call-to-action section should have a button and a paragraph of text.
5. The email template should be responsive and work well on different screen sizes.

constraints: Use only HTML and CSS for styling.
Do not use any external libraries or frameworks other than Tailwind CSS.
Make sure the email template is accessible and has a good user experience.
